ports.022C: SB DSP write-buffer status / write cmd

1047:0010.label: sb_init_ports
1047:0010.comment: Stores per-port addresses derived from base arg (0x220) into globals at [05D0]-[05DA]

1047:006C.label: sb_dsp_write
1047:006C.comment: Writes one command/data byte to DSP after polling write-buffer status (0x22C bit 7)

1047:00A6.label: sb_dsp_read
1047:00A6.comment: Reads one data byte from DSP after polling read-buffer status (0x22E bit 7)

1047:00DC.label: sb_dsp_reset
1047:00DC.comment: DSP reset: assert reset line (0x226=1), 5-NOP delay, deassert (0x226=0), wait for 0xAA ready byte from 0x22A

1047:0178.label: sb_get_version
1047:0178.comment: Sends DSP command 0xE1 (get version), reads 2-byte major/minor response; got 4.5 in trace

1047:0A9A.label: io_read_port
1047:0A9A.comment: Generic port-read helper: in al, dx where port is passed as stack arg

1047:0AA8.label: io_write_port
1047:0AA8.comment: Generic port-write helper: out dx, al where port and value are passed as stack args

lineComments.1047:0081: bit 7 clear = write buffer not full; write the byte
lineComments.1047:00FA: 5 NOPs: minimum reset pulse hold delay before deasserting
lineComments.1047:0117: bit 7 set = read data available after reset
lineComments.1047:015F: DSP acknowledges reset with magic byte 0xAA
